restaurant.name: Bella Cucina
restaurant.description: Authentic flavors crafted with passion. Available for dine-in, takeout, and private catering events.

items.title: Truffle Risotto
items.description: Creamy Arborio rice with black truffle shavings, parmesan, and fresh herbs.
items.recipe:
Ingredients:
- 300g Arborio rice
- 50g black truffle
- 100g parmesan
- 1L vegetable stock
- 1 shallot, diced
- 2 tbsp butter
- White wine

Method:
Sauté shallot in butter, add rice and toast 2 min. Deglaze with wine. Add warm stock ladle by ladle, stirring constantly. Finish with truffle and parmesan.

items.title: Burrata Caprese
items.description: Fresh burrata with heirloom tomatoes, basil oil, and aged balsamic.
items.recipe:
Ingredients:
- 2 burrata balls
- 4 heirloom tomatoes
- Fresh basil
- Extra virgin olive oil
- Aged balsamic glaze
- Sea salt & black pepper

Method:
Slice tomatoes, arrange with burrata. Drizzle with olive oil and balsamic. Season and garnish with basil.

items.title: Grilled Sea Bass
items.description: Mediterranean sea bass with lemon caper butter, roasted vegetables, and herb oil.
items.recipe:
Ingredients:
- 2 sea bass fillets
- 2 tbsp capers
- 1 lemon
- 50g butter
- Mixed vegetables
- Fresh herbs

Method:
Season fish, grill skin-side down 4 min. Flip and cook 2 more min. Make caper butter by melting butter with capers and lemon juice. Serve over roasted veg.

items.title: Tiramisu
items.description: Classic Italian tiramisu with espresso-soaked ladyfingers and mascarpone cream.
items.recipe:
Ingredients:
- 250g mascarpone
- 3 eggs, separated
- 80g sugar
- 200ml espresso
- Ladyfinger biscuits
- Cocoa powder

Method:
Whip yolks with sugar until pale. Fold in mascarpone. Whip whites to stiff peaks, fold in. Dip ladyfingers in espresso, layer with cream. Dust with cocoa. Chill 4 hours.

items.title: Aperol Spritz
items.description: Classic Italian aperitif with Aperol, Prosecco, and a splash of soda.
items.recipe:
Ingredients:
- 3 parts Prosecco
- 2 parts Aperol
- 1 splash soda water
- Orange slice
- Ice

Method:
Fill glass with ice. Add Prosecco first, then Aperol, then soda. Garnish with orange.

items.title: Catering Platter
items.description: Premium selection of antipasti, charcuterie, and artisan cheeses. Serves 6–8.
items.recipe:
Includes:
- Prosciutto di Parma
- Salami Milano
- Burrata & mozzarella
- Marinated olives
- Grilled vegetables
- Artisan bread
- Seasonal fruits
- Honey & fig jam

Perfect for events and gatherings. Order 48h in advance.
